from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 第一步：解析公司名称到company_id
query_jingtang = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name = '首钢京唐钢铁' OR name LIKE '%京唐%' OR name LIKE '%首钢京唐%'
LIMIT 10
""")
df_jingtang = pd.read_sql(query_jingtang, engine)
print("首钢京唐钢铁相关公司:")
print(df_jingtang[['id', 'name', 'industry_type']])

query_hanbao = text("""
SELECT id, name, industry_type 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name = '河钢集团邯宝钢铁' OR name LIKE '%邯宝%' OR name LIKE '%河钢邯宝%'
LIMIT 10
""")
df_hanbao = pd.read_sql(query_hanbao, engine)
print("\n河钢集团邯宝钢铁相关公司:")
print(df_hanbao[['id', 'name', 'industry_type']])

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 已解析的公司ID
company_id_jingtang = 2444  # 首钢京唐钢铁联合有限责任公司
company_id_hanbao = 2611   # 邯钢集团邯宝钢铁有限公司

# 获取2025-06-10全天的排放数据（从00:00到次日00:00）
query_jingtang_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, hcl, hc, nmhc
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")

df_jingtang_emission = pd.read_sql(query_jingtang_emission, engine)
print(f"首钢京唐钢铁 (company_id={company_id_jingtang}) 2025-06-10 排放数据行数: {len(df_jingtang_emission)}")
if len(df_jingtang_emission) > 0:
    print(f"exhaust_gas 统计: 最小={df_jingtang_emission['exhaust_gas'].min()}, 最大={df_jingtang_emission['exhaust_gas'].max()}, 平均={df_jingtang_emission['exhaust_gas'].mean():.2f}")
    print(f"exhaust_gas 总和: {df_jingtang_emission['exhaust_gas'].sum():.2f}")
    print("\n前5条数据:")
    print(df_jingtang_emission.head())

query_hanbao_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, hcl, hc, nmhc
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2611 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")

df_hanbao_emission = pd.read_sql(query_hanbao_emission, engine)
print(f"\n河钢集团邯宝钢铁 (company_id={company_id_hanbao}) 2025-06-10 排放数据行数: {len(df_hanbao_emission)}")
if len(df_hanbao_emission) > 0:
    print(f"exhaust_gas 统计: 最小={df_hanbao_emission['exhaust_gas'].min()}, 最大={df_hanbao_emission['exhaust_gas'].max()}, 平均={df_hanbao_emission['exhaust_gas'].mean():.2f}")
    print(f"exhaust_gas 总和: {df_hanbao_emission['exhaust_gas'].sum():.2f}")
    print("\n前5条数据:")
    print(df_hanbao_emission.head())

# 计算所需指标
total_flue_gas_jingtang = 875283100.00
total_flue_gas_hanbao = 436143500.00
higher_emitter_company_id = 2444  # 首钢京唐钢铁排放量更高
emission_ratio = round(total_flue_gas_jingtang / total_flue_gas_hanbao, 2)

print(f"首钢京唐钢铁 (company_id=2444) 2025-06-10 总烟气排放量: {total_flue_gas_jingtang:.2f} 立方米")
print(f"河钢集团邯宝钢铁 (company_id=2611) 2025-06-10 总烟气排放量: {total_flue_gas_hanbao:.2f} 立方米")
print(f"更高排放企业: company_id={higher_emitter_company_id}")
print(f"排放比率 (高/低): {emission_ratio}")

# 存储结果供synthesis agent使用
jingtang_total_exhaust_gas = total_flue_gas_jingtang
hanbao_total_exhaust_gas = total_flue_gas_hanbao
higher_emitter_id = higher_emitter_company_id
ratio_higher_lower = emission_ratio

# 存储最终结果供 synthesis agent 使用
total_flue_gas_jingtang = 875283100.00
total_flue_gas_hanbao = 436143500.00
higher_emitter_company_id = 2444
emission_ratio = 2.01

# 自有变量备份供复用
jingtang_total_exhaust_gas = total_flue_gas_jingtang
hanbao_total_exhaust_gas = total_flue_gas_hanbao
higher_emitter_id = higher_emitter_company_id
ratio_higher_lower = emission_ratio

print("=== 数据获取与计算完成 ===")
print(f"首钢京唐钢铁 (company_id=2444) 2025-06-10 总烟气排放量: {total_flue_gas_jingtang} m³")
print(f"河钢集团邯宝钢铁 (company_id=2611) 2025-06-10 总烟气排放量: {total_flue_gas_hanbao} m³")
print(f"更高排放企业 ID: {higher_emitter_company_id}")
print(f"排放比率 (高/低): {emission_ratio}")

# 数据获取与计算已完成，结果已存入自有变量供 synthesis agent 复用
print("=== 数据获取完成 ===")
print(f"公司ID解析: 首钢京唐钢铁=2444, 河钢邯宝钢铁=2611")
print(f"2025-06-10 排放数据行数: 首钢京唐=24条, 河钢邯宝=24条")
print(f"总烟气排放量: 首钢京唐={jingtang_total_exhaust_gas} m³, 河钢邯宝={hanbao_total_exhaust_gas} m³")
print(f"更高排放企业ID: {higher_emitter_id}, 排放比率: {ratio_higher_lower}")

import pandas as pd

# 计算首钢京唐钢铁2025-06-10的总烟气排放量
jingtang_total = df_jingtang_emission['exhaust_gas'].sum()
print(f"首钢京唐钢铁总烟气排放量: {jingtang_total}")

# 计算河钢集团邯钢钢铁2025-06-10的总烟气排放量
hanbao_total = df_hanbao_emission['exhaust_gas'].sum()
print(f"河钢集团邯钢钢铁总烟气排放量: {hanbao_total}")

# 确定排放量较高的公司
if jingtang_total >= hanbao_total:
    higher_emitter_id = company_id_jingtang
    lower_emitter_id = company_id_hanbao
    higher_total = jingtang_total
    lower_total = hanbao_total
else:
    higher_emitter_id = company_id_hanbao
    lower_emitter_id = company_id_jingtang
    higher_total = hanbao_total
    lower_total = jingtang_total

# 计算排放比率
emission_ratio = higher_total / lower_total

print(f"排放量较高的公司ID: {higher_emitter_id}")
print(f"排放比率 (高/低): {emission_ratio:.2f}")

# 存储结果到新的变量中
jingtang_total_exhaust_gas = float(jingtang_total)
hanbao_total_exhaust_gas = float(hanbao_total)
higher_emitter_company_id = int(higher_emitter_id)
emission_ratio_value = float(round(emission_ratio, 2))

print(f"\n最终结果:")
print(f"首钢京唐钢铁总烟气排放量: {jingtang_total_exhaust_gas}")
print(f"河钢集团邯钢钢铁总烟气排放量: {hanbao_total_exhaust_gas}")
print(f"排放量较高的公司ID: {higher_emitter_company_id}")
print(f"排放比率: {emission_ratio_value}")

# 存储最终结果到指定的变量中
total_flue_gas_jingtang = 875283100.0
total_flue_gas_hanbao = 436143500.0
higher_emitter_company_id = 2444
emission_ratio = 2.01

print("结果已存储:")
print(f"total_flue_gas_jingtang: {total_flue_gas_jingtang}")
print(f"total_flue_gas_hanbao: {total_flue_gas_hanbao}")
print(f"higher_emitter_company_id: {higher_emitter_company_id}")
print(f"emission_ratio: {emission_ratio}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Query company IDs and their total exhaust gas on 2025-06-10
query = text("""
SELECT pc.id as company_id, pc.name, SUM(hpce.exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM polluting_company pc
JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission hpce ON pc.id = hpce.company_id
WHERE DATE(hpce.timestamp) = '2025-06-10'
AND pc.name IN ('Shougang Jingtang Steel', 'Hangang Group Hanbao Steel')
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name
""")

df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Company emissions on 2025-06-10:")
print(df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Use the already-resolved company IDs from upstream agents
# Query total exhaust gas for both companies on 2025-06-10
query = text(f"""
SELECT company_id, SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id IN ({company_id_jingtang}, {company_id_hanbao})
AND DATE(timestamp) = '2025-06-10'
GROUP BY company_id
""")

df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print("Company exhaust gas totals on 2025-06-10:")
print(df)

# Assign output variables based on the query results
jingtang_total = float(df.loc[df['company_id'] == company_id_jingtang, 'total_exhaust_gas'].values[0])
hanbao_total = float(df.loc[df['company_id'] == company_id_hanbao, 'total_exhaust_gas'].values[0])

total_flue_gas_jingtang = jingtang_total
total_flue_gas_hanbao = hanbao_total

higher_emitter_company_id = int(df.loc[df['total_exhaust_gas'].idxmax(), 'company_id'])
emission_ratio = round(float(df['total_exhaust_gas'].max() / df['total_exhaust_gas'].min()), 2)

print(f"total_flue_gas_jingtang: {total_flue_gas_jingtang}")
print(f"total_flue_gas_hanbao: {total_flue_gas_hanbao}")
print(f"higher_emitter_company_id: {higher_emitter_company_id}")
print(f"emission_ratio: {emission_ratio}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Find company IDs for the two steel enterprises
query_companies = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%京唐%' OR name LIKE '%邯宝%'
ORDER BY name
""")
df_companies = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print("Found companies:")
print(df_companies)

import pandas as pd

SELECT SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2444
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
""")
df_jingtang = pd.read_sql(query_jingtang, engine)

print(df_jingtang)

# Hanbao Steel (id: 2611)

SELECT SUM(exhaust_gas) as total_exhaust_gas

WHERE company_id = 2611
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
""")
df_hanbao = pd.read_sql(query_hanbao, engine)

print(df_hanbao)

emission_ratio = total_flue_gas_jingtang / total_flue_gas_hanbao
